title: Compressor
description: Adds condensed versions of many items and blocks
body:
This mod adds a few compressed versions of some blocks.
Each compressed block is crafted with 9 of the previous one. There are also tiers of coal created with 8 of the previous tier (including minecraft's coal) and an alchemy catalyst 
Pumpkin Baskets:
- Basket of Pumpkins (9 Pumpkins)
- Double Basket of Pumpkins (81 Pumpkins)
- Triple Basket of Pumpkins (729 Pumpkins)
- Quadruple Basket of Pumpkins (6,561 Pumpkins)
- Quintuple Basket of Pumpkins (59,049 Pumpkins)
- Sextuple Basket of Pumpkins (531,441 Pumpkins)

Carrot Baskets:
- Basket of Carrots (9 Carrots)
- Double Basket of Carrots (81 Carrots)
- Triple Basket of Carrots (729 Carrots)
- Quadruple Basket of Carrots (6,561 Carrots)
- Quintuple Basket of Carrots (59,049 Carrots)
- Sextuple Basket of Carrots (531,441 Carrots)

Cobblestone:
- Compressed Cobblestone (9 Cobblestone)
- Double Compressed Cobblestone (81 Cobblestone)
- Triple Compressed Cobblestone (729 Cobblestone)
- Quadruple Compressed Cobblestone (6,561 Cobblestone)
- Quintuple Comprssed Cobblestone (59,049 Cobblestone)
- Sextuple Compressed Cobblestone (531,441 Cobblestone)
- Septuple Compressed Cobblestone (4,782,969 Cobblestone)
- Octuple Compressed Cobblestone (43,046,721 Cobblestone)
- Nontuple Compressed Cobblestone (387,420,489 Cobblestone)
- Dectuple Compressed Cobblestone (3,486,784,401 Cobblestone)

Dirt:
- Compressed Dirt (9 Dirt)
- Double Compressed Dirt (81 Dirt)
- Triple Compressed Dirt (729 Dirt)
- Quadruple Compressed Dirt (6,561 Dirt)
- Quintuple Comprssed Dirt (59,049 Dirt)
- Sextuple Compressed Dirt (531,441 Dirt)
- Septuple Compressed Dirt (4,782,969 Dirt)
- Octuple Compressed Dirt (43,046,721 Dirt)
- Nontuple Compressed Dirt (387,420,489 Dirt)
- Dectuple Compressed Dirt (3,486,784,401 Dirt)

Logs (of every type) up to Dectuple Compressed versions

I plan on adding many more. I want to do one for every single item and block
